spacesOrTabs.description: Whether spaces or tabs are used while formatting

numberOfSpacesInTabs.description: How many spaces are inserted when tab is pressed

wrapLongLines.description: Whether long lines will be wrapped onto a new line

wrapLinesLongerThan.description: Lines with more than this number of characters will be wrapped

whiteSpaceBeforeSemiColon.description: Whether spaces will be inserted before semicolons

preserveExistingEmptyLinesBetweenStateme.description: Preserve existing empty lines between statements

preserveExistingEmptyLinesAfterBatchSepa.description: Preserve existing empty lines after batch separator

emptyLinesBetweenStatements.description: How many empty lines to insert between separate statements

emptyLinesAfterBatchSeparator.description: How many empty lines to insert after a batch separator

placeFirstItemOnNewLine.desciption: Place first item in list on new line

placeSubsequentItemsOnNewLines.description: Place subsequent list items on new lines

alignSubsequentItemsWithFirstItem.description: Align subsequent list items with first item

alignItemsToTabStops.description: Align list items to tab stops

commaAlignment.description: How commas separating list items are aligned

parenthesisStyle.description: The format to use for parenthesized code

indentParenthesesContents.desciption: Whether the contents of parentheses are indented

collapseShortParenthesisContents.description: Collapse short contents of parentheses onto a single line

collapseParenthesesShorterThan.description: Contents with fewer than this number of characters will be collapsed onto a single line if enabled

addSpacesAroundParentheses.description: Whether spaces will be added around parentheses

addSpacesInsideParentheses.description: Whether spaces are added around parentheses' contents

builtInDataTypes.description: How built-in data types are cased

useObjectDefinitionCase.description: Use the case from the definition when casing objects

placeInsertTableOnNewLine.description: In INSERT table statements, place table name on a new line

placeDistinctAndTopClausesOnNewLine.description: Whether to place DISTINCT and TOP clauses on a new line

addNewLineAfterDistinctAndTopClauses.description: Whether to add a new line after DISTINCT and TOP clauses

collapseShortStatements.description: Collapse short statements onto a single line

collapseStatementsShorterThan.description: Statements that are shorter than this will be collapsed onto a single line if enabled

collapseShortSubqueries.description: Collapse short subqueries onto a single line

collapseSubqueriesShorterThan.description: Subqueries that are shorter than this will be collapsed onto a single line if enabled

clauseAlignment.description: How clauses withing DML statements are aligned

clauseIndentation.description: The number of spaces to indent clauses within DML statements

listItems.description: Formatting options for DML list items

placeFromTableOnNewLine.description: When to place the table in a DML statement on a new line

placeWhereConditionOnNewLine.description: When to place a WHERE condition in a DML statement on a new line

placeGroupByAndOrderByOnNewLine.description: When to place GROUP BY and ORDER BY clauses in a DML statement on a new line

parenthesisStyle.description: The format to use for parenthesized DDL code

indentParenthesesContents.description: Whether the contents of parentheses in DDL statements are indented

alignDataTypesAndConstraints.description: Whether to align data types and constraints

placeConstraintsOnNewLines.description: Whether to place constraints on a new line

placeConstraintColumnsOnNewLines.description: When to place constraint columns on a new line

indentClauses.description: Whether to indent clauses in DDL statements

placeFirstProcedureParameterOnNewLine.description: Whether to place the first parameter of a stored procedure on a new line

collapseShortStatements.description: Collapse short DDL statements onto a single line

collapseStatementsShorterThan.description: DDL statements that are shorter than this will be collapsed onto a single line if enabled

placeBeginAndEndOnNewLine.description: Whether BEGIN and END keywords are placed on new lines

indentBeginAndEndKeywords.description: Whether to indent BEGIN and END keywords

indentContentsOfStatements.description: Whether the contents of control flow statements are indented

collapseShortStatements.description: Collapse short control flow statements onto a single line

collapseStatementsShorterThan.description: Control flow statements that are shorter than this will be collapsed onto a single line if enabled

parenthesisStyle.description: The format to use for parenthesized CTE code

indentContents.description: Whether to indent clauses in CTE statements

placeNameOnNewLine.description: Whether the CTE name is placed on a new line

indentName.description: Whether the CTE name is indented

placeColumnsOnNewLine.description: Whether the CTE columns are placed on a new line

columnAlignment.description: How the columns in a CTE are aligned

placeAsOnNewLine.description: Whether the AS keyword is placed on a new line

asAlignment.description: How the AS keyword is aligned

alignDataTypesAndValues.description: Whether to align the data types and values in DECLARE statements

addSpaceBetweenDataTypeAndPrecision.description: Whether a space is added between a data type and its precision

placeAssignedValueOnNewLineIfLongerThanM.description: Whether the assigned value is placed on a new line in long SET statements

placeEqualsSignOnNewLine.description: Whether the = sign is placed on a new line

placeOnNewLine.description: Whether the JOIN keyword is placed on a new line

keywordAlignment.description: How the JOIN keyword is aligned

insertEmptyLineBetweenJoinClauses.description: Whether empty lines are inserted between JOIN clauses

placeJoinTableOnNewLine.description: Whether the join table is placed on a new line

indentJoinTable.description: Whether the join table is indented

placeOnNewLine.description: Whether the ON keyword is placed on a new line

keywordAlignment.description: How the ON keyword is aligned

placeConditionOnNewLine.description: Whether a join condition is placed on a new line

parenthesisStyle.description: The format to use for parenthesized insert statements

placeSubsequentColumnsOnNewLines.description: When to place subsequent columns on new lines

parenthesisStyle.description: The format to use for values in INSERT statements

placeSubsequentValuesOnNewLines.description: When to place subsequent values on new lines

placeArgumentsOnNewLines.description: When to place arguments on new lines

addSpacesAroundParentheses.description: Whether to add spaces around parentheses

addSpacesAroundArgumentList.description: Whether to add spaces around argument list

addSpaceBetweenEmptyParentheses.description: Whether to add space between empty parentheses

placeExpressionOnNewLine.description: Whether to place expression on new line

placeFirstWhenOnNewLine.description: When to place the first WHEN keyword on a new line

whenAlignment.description: How the WHEN keywords are aligned

placeThenOnNewLine.description: Whether the THEN keyword is placed on a new line

thenAlignment.description: How the THEN keywords are aligned

placeElseOnNewLine.description: Whether the ELSE keyword is placed on new line

alignElseToWhen.description: Whether to align the ELSE keyword to the WHEN keyword

placeEndOnNewLine.description: Whether to place the END keyword on new line

endAlignment.description: How the END keyword is aligned

collapseShortCaseExpressions.description: Collapse short CASE expressions onto a single line

collapseCaseExpressionsShorterThan.description: CASE expressions shorter than this will be collapsed onto a single line if enabled

addSpacesAround.description: Whether to add spaces around comparison operators
Whether to add spaces around arithmetic operators

placeOnNewLine.description: When to place AND / OR operators on a new line

alignment.description: How to align AND / OR operators

placeKeywordBeforeCondition.description: Whether to place AND / OR keyword before condition

placeOnNewLine.description: Whether to place BETWEEN operator on a new line

placeAndKeywordOnNewLine.description: Whether to place AND keyword on a new line

andAlignment.description: How to align the AND keyword if placing AND keyword on a new line is enabled

placeOpeningParenthesisOnNewLine.description: Whether to place opening parenthesis on new line

alignment.description: How to align the IN keyword

placeFirstValueOnNewLine.description: When to place the first value on a new line

placeSubsequentValuesOnNewLines.description: When to place subsequent values on new lines

addSpaceAroundInContents.description: Whether to add a space around IN contents
